'''jochagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgeful|judgeful]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgeful|judgeful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jochagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jochagithi|jochagithi]] || [[word:jochagiji|jochagiji]] || [[word:jochagishi|jochagishi]] || [[word:jochagiki|jochagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jochaguthuthu|jochaguthuthu]] || [[word:jochagujuju|jochagujuju]] || [[word:jochagushushu|jochagushushu]] || [[word:jochagukuku|jochagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jochaguthu|jochaguthu]] || [[word:jochaguju|jochaguju]] || [[word:jochagushu|jochagushu]] || [[word:jochaguku|jochaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jochagufthuf|jochagufthuf]] || [[word:jochagufjuf|jochagufjuf]] || [[word:jochagufshuf|jochagufshuf]] || [[word:jochagufkuf|jochagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jochagethe|jochagethe]] || [[word:jochageje|jochageje]] || [[word:jochageshe|jochageshe]] || [[word:jochageke|jochageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jochagothotho|jochagothotho]] || [[word:jochagojojo|jochagojojo]] || [[word:jochagoshosho|jochagoshosho]] || [[word:jochagokoko|jochagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jochagotho|jochagotho]] || [[word:jochagojo|jochagojo]] || [[word:jochagosho|jochagosho]] || [[word:jochagoko|jochagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jochagofthof|jochagofthof]] || [[word:jochagofjof|jochagofjof]] || [[word:jochagofshof|jochagofshof]] || [[word:jochagofkof|jochagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jochagïfthïf|jochagïfthïf]] || [[word:jochagïfjïf|jochagïfjïf]] || [[word:jochagïfshïf|jochagïfshïf]] || [[word:jochagïfkïf|jochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jochagïfthïfthïf|jochagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:jochagïfjïfjïf|jochagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:jochagïfshïfshïf|jochagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:jochagïfkïfkïf|jochagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jochagïfthïf|jochagïfthïf]] || [[word:jochagïfjïf|jochagïfjïf]] || [[word:jochagïfshïf|jochagïfshïf]] || [[word:jochagïfkïf|jochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jochagïfthïf|jochagïfthïf]] || [[word:jochagïfjïf|jochagïfjïf]] || [[word:jochagïfshïf|jochagïfshïf]] || [[word:jochagïfkïf|jochagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jochagæthæ|jochagæthæ]] || [[word:jochagæjæ|jochagæjæ]] || [[word:jochagæshæ|jochagæshæ]] || [[word:jochagækæ|jochagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jochagathatha|jochagathatha]] || [[word:jochagajaja|jochagajaja]] || [[word:jochagashasha|jochagashasha]] || [[word:jochagakaka|jochagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jochagatha|jochagatha]] || [[word:jochagaja|jochagaja]] || [[word:jochagasha|jochagasha]] || [[word:jochagaka|jochagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jochagafthaf|jochagafthaf]] || [[word:jochagafjaf|jochagafjaf]] || [[word:jochagafshaf|jochagafshaf]] || [[word:jochagafkaf|jochagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jochagasha|jochagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jochagshësha|jochagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jochagrosha|jochagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jochagmusha|jochagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jochagyasha|jochagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojochagnkshësha|gojochagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojochagnkrosha|gojochagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojochagnkmusha|gojochagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojochagnkyasha|gojochagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jochachagasha|jochachagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jochachagshësha|jochachagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jochachagrosha|jochachagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jochachagmusha|jochachagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jochachagyasha|jochachagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojochachagnkshësha|gojochachagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojochachagnkrosha|gojochachagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojochachagnkmusha|gojochachagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojochachagnkyasha|gojochachagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jechægasha|jechægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jechægshësha|jechægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jechægrosha|jechægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jechægmusha|jechægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jechægyasha|jechægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojechægnkshësha|gojechægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojechægnkrosha|gojechægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojechægnkmusha|gojechægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojechægnkyasha|gojechægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jochfagasha|jochfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jochfagshësha|jochfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jochfagrosha|jochfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jochfagmusha|jochfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jochfagyasha|jochfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojochfagnkshësha|gojochfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojochfagnkrosha|gojochfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojochfagnkmusha|gojochfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojochfagnkyasha|gojochfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
